impact: This gives the next daemon cycle explicit syntax-first recovery rules for checkbox-27: one changed Python test file, exact fixture path, standard-library-only unittest helpers, no bare asserts, no pseudo-code fragments, and a py_compile preflight before full discovery. It narrows worker proposals after repeated SyntaxError rollbacks without implementing the PP&D domain task.
summary: Strengthen PP&D daemon repair guidance for repeated syntax and compile rollbacks.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 2 recent validation rollbacks were syntax or compile failures; patch daemon prompt, preflight, or repair guidance before more worker attempts

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
